occurrence_sentence: To accelerate its efforts, Infleqtion signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Texas A&M University and the Texas A&M Semiconductor Institute to create a new, world-class quantum program focused on developing next-generation quantum technologies and products, including quantum applications for scaling artificial intelligence (AI) using quantum.

mentions.occurrence_sentence: Infleqtion unveils 5-year quantum computing roadmap advancing plans to commercialize quantum at scale
Infleqtion unveiled its 5-year quantum computing roadmap, looking at commercial quantum solutions by the end of the decade.

During a live webinar, Infleqtion, the world's leading quantum information company, shared a broad business update, including the first look at its new 5-year quantum computing roadmap as well as new partnerships and customer wins that underscore the company's progress toward commercializing quantum solutions at scale.

During a live webinar, Infleqtion, the world's leading quantum information company, shared a broad business update, including the first look at its new 5-year quantum computing roadmap as well as new partnerships and customer wins that underscore the company's progress toward commercializing quantum solutions at scale.

mentions.role_in_text: Developing and delivering quantum computing testbeds and leading quantum thrust for cyber defense exercises.
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Infleqtion has been selected to develop and deliver a quantum computing testbed for the National Quantum Computing Centre (NQCC) in the United Kingdom.

mentions.role_in_text: Delivering a state-of-the-art large-scale neutral-atom quantum computer and leading the quantum thrust for Defence Cyber Marvel 3.
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Infleqtion will deliver a state-of-the-art large-scale neutral-atom quantum computer with a compelling pathway to logical qubit operations.

mentions.role_in_text: Company developing quantum technologies and products.
mentions.occurrence_sentence: To accelerate its efforts, Infleqtion signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Texas A&M University and the Texas A&M Semiconductor Institute to create a new, world-class quantum program focused on developing next-generation quantum technologies and products, including quantum applications for scaling artificial intelligence (AI) using quantum.
Infleqtion also shared updates on its optical atomic clock platform Tiqker, underscoring how the company's core technology platform extends to multiple commercial use cases.
